changes.reason: Edgren: palese [L. palàm, openly], ADJ.: known (manifest, plain) — 'manifest' is the period dictionary's primary rendering, and pairs more naturally with 'effective' in the compound phrase 'capo effettivo e palese'
changes.context_sentence: rie*, names Giuseppe Mazzini as the effective and manifest chief of this attempt, using as pretext the meagre numb
